artPrompt: A living plant creature rooted directly into a suburban front lawn, its trunk a knot of grassy fibers sprouting clover-leaf hands and a face of mossy bark, golden coins of pollen drifting from its blossoms. A single warm shaft of late sun spotlights it against the brooding dark of a picket fence, dewdrops glinting like impasto flecks. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Grassroots Fundraiser
text:
{T}: Add {G}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color for each five Voters you control. (Small-dollar donations. Very small. Mostly grass.)
flavorText: Roots literally in the grass. The campaign finance auditor has stopped trying to fill out the form.
